message:
fix(e2e): replace networkidle with domcontentloaded for reliability

The networkidle wait state is known to be flaky in webkit browsers,
especially when analytics, service workers, or lazy-loaded resources
are present. Using domcontentloaded is more reliable while still
ensuring the page is interactive.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
